prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约4297→4729→9013→8623→8639名。2021–2022年稳定在4300–4700名区间，2023年因专业结构调整（招生专业从10个缩减至6个 ，新增小语种专业）位次大幅后移至9013名，2024–2025年稳定在8600–8640名区间，2025年基准位次约8639名；2021–2025年物理类招生计划分别为12→12→11→10 →8人，呈持续缩招趋势；2026年计划仍为8人，与2025年持平。缩招趋势暂缓，但招生规模已较2021年缩减33%，竞争程度相对稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海外国语大学为21 1工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第93位持续上升至2026年第81位，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力获得认可；2026年声誉评价为中性/混 合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第49位，评价为较热。历史投档异常记录中未见该校有断档或暴跌记录；外国语言文学获评A+（第五轮学科评估），为该校 唯一A+学科。物理类招生专业中，数据科学与大数据技术、精算学等与语言类核心优势关联较弱，但依托学校整体平台仍有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业中， 数据科学与大数据技术对应计算机类，精算学对应金融/财经/经济类（分化观望），整体专业热度较高。重庆市2026年普通高考总人数约2 09000人，按近年物理类占比约66%估算，2026年物理类考生约137940人，较2025年139478人减少约1.1%，考生规模小幅缩减。；该校位于上海市，对西南地区考生属于跨省求学。学校在重庆物理类招生仅8人 ，占比较小，地域偏好因素中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次已趋稳（8600+名区间）、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、物理类考生规模小幅缩减（约-1.1%）、学校 软科排名持续上升、物理类招生专业（数据科学、精算学等）社会热度偏高等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准8639名基础上略有前移（竞争略减），预测最低位次 约8609名，区间8109–9109名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 4297 → 4729 → 9013 → 8623 → 8639. In 2021–2022, it stabilized in the 4300–4700 range. In 2023, due to adjustments in the major structure (reducing from 10 to 6 majors, adding minor language majors), the ranking significantly dropped to 9013. In 2024–2025, it stabilized in the 8600–8640 range, with a baseline ranking of about 8639 in 2025. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plan for Physics Category was 12 → 12 → 11 → 10 → 8, showing a continuous contraction trend. The 2026 plan remains at 8, unchanged from 2025. The contraction trend has slowed, but the enrollment scale has decreased by 33% compared to 2021, and competition is relatively stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai International Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has steadily risen from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026, reflecting growing recognition of its comprehensive strength. In 2026, its reputation is rated as neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 49th, rated as relatively hot. There are no records of ranking drops or crashes in historical admission anomalies. Foreign Language and Literature was rated A+ (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A+ discipline at the university. Among the Physics Category majors, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Actuarial Science, etc., have weak ties to the core strengths in language studies, but they still attract students due to the overall platform of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the Physics Category majors, Data Science and Big Data Technology corresponds to the computer category, and Actuarial Science corresponds to finance/economics (with differentiated outlook). Overall, the majors are relatively popular. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Chongqing Gaokao is about 209,000. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 66%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 137,940, a decrease of about 1.1% from 139,478 in 2025, indicating a slight reduction in candidate scale. The university is located in Shanghai, which is a cross-province study destination for candidates from the southwestern region. The university only enrolls 8 students in Physics Category in Chongqing, a small proportion, so regional preference factors are neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the rankings have stabilized in 2024–2025 (8600+ range), the 2026 enrollment plan is unchanged from 2025, the Physics Category candidate scale has slightly decreased (about -1.1%), the university's Soft Science ranking continues to rise, and the Physics Category majors (Data Science, Actuarial Science, etc.) have high social popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly improve (less competition) from the 2025 baseline of 8639. The predicted minimum ranking is about 8609, with a range of 8109–9109.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (8109–9109), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 8100), prioritize competitive majors like Translation, Data Science and Big Data Technology. For rankings near the upper limit (e.g., around 9000), it is advisable to mainly target Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 788 → 1384 → 1191 → 1552 → 1649, showing a fluctuating and backward trend. The ranking was best in 2021 (788th), then gradually moved back in subsequent years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1649th, with a cumulative backward shift of about 458 positions over the past 3 years, reflecting a decline in the school's competitive popularity among History Category examinees. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for History Category were 8 → 8 → 9 → 10 → 12 students, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan remains at 12 students, unchanged from 2025. The expansion trend has temporarily slowed, providing limited relief to competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai International Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026, reflecting recognition of the school's comprehensive strength and educational quality. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving daily management topics such as air conditioning fee disputes, with no major negative public opinion. It ranks 49th in Douyin popularity, evaluated as relatively hot, with mid-to-high exposure on short video platforms, showing no obvious panic or overheating signals for applications. Historical admission anomaly records show no instances of cutoff drops or crashes for this school. Foreign Language and Literature was rated A+ (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the school's only A+ discipline, at the top level nationwide, strongly attracting language-oriented examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of foreign language majors in 2024 is evaluated as generally wait-and-see, with an overall trend of being stable and slightly cold. Journalism and Communication majors are clearly discouraged. The core advantageous majors (language majors) of this school have not seen a significant increase in social popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Chongqing Gaokao is about 209,000, slightly decreasing from 2025 (History Category 73,373 + Physics Category 139,478 = 212,851). Based on the recent History Category proportion of about 34%, the estimated number of History Category examinees in 2026 is about 71,060, a decrease of about 3.1% from 73,373 in 2025, with a slight reduction in candidate scale and slightly eased competitive pressure. The school is located in Shanghai, which is a cross-province study for candidates from the Southwest region, with neutral regional preference factors. The school's enrollment plan in Chongqing accounts for a small proportion (12 students in History Category), with no obvious regional bias signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, a slight reduction in History Category examinee scale (about -3.1%), the continuous rise in the school's Soft Science ranking, and the stable and slightly cold social popularity of foreign language majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move forward (slightly reduced competition) from the 2025 baseline of 1649th. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1629th, with a range of 1336–1922nd.
